title: Review Findings
description: Unified findings array produced by ops-pr-respond's normalize step after parallel review aggregation. Each item is one reviewer concern, source-tagged so downstream triage can weigh cross-source corroboration. Schema-validated before triage.

total.description: Total count of findings — must match findings array length.

summary.description: One-line synthesis describing the overall finding distribution.

source.description: Originating reviewer or audit pipeline (e.g., audit-security, ops-pr-review-core/quality, audit-doc-scan).

file.description: File path relative to the project root, or empty when not applicable.

line.description: Line number, or 0 when not applicable.

description.description: Concrete description of the issue and its impact.

recommendation.description: Suggested fix the resolve step can act on.
